reviews.comment:
Alguna vez paro ahí para cargar gas oil. Y siempre tienen algún problema: no pueden hacer factura A, o no les anda la aplicación, o no pueden juntar las. Una pena por que me queda de pasada.

(Translated by Google)
I sometimes stop there to fill up with diesel. And they always have some problem: they can't issue invoices, or their app isn't working, or they can't compile the invoices. It's a shame because it's on my way.
